Footer.tagline: The cloud platform for dealerships: customers, vehicles, contracts, and invoices in one continuous workflow.

LandingMeta.title: AutoSaaS | More Time for Customers. Less Time in the Office.
LandingMeta.description: AutoSaaS centralizes all relevant data: customers, vehicles, employees, contracts, and invoices. Cloud-based, GDPR-compliant, hosted in Germany.

LandingPage.description: AutoSaaS stores all relevant data centrally. You manage customer, vehicle, and employee records, create invoices in one click, and work faster with more focus on your core business.
LandingPage.featureTitle: Why You Should Switch to AutoSaaS
LandingPage.featureIntro: Benefits that immediately simplify your day-to-day work and noticeably reduce operational load for your team.
LandingPage.helpText: Questions? We help you get started.
LandingPage.finalTitle: Try AutoSaaS for free in your real daily workflow.
LandingPage.finalDescription: Start without installation and for free. In just a few minutes, customers, vehicles, and invoices run in one clear process.

items.title: Everything in the Cloud
bullets: No installation, start directly in the browser.

items.title: Simple Management
bullets: Manage customer, vehicle, and billing data centrally.
All teams work on the same up-to-date data.
Less back-and-forth and fewer tool switches.

items.title: Legally Safe Contracts
bullets: Generate documents from customer and vehicle records.
Customize templates to fit your workflow.

items.title: Visibility & Compliance
bullets: Track key numbers and analysis at any time.
Store documents safely in archival format.
E-invoicing with XRechnung and ZUGFeRD included.

items.title: Automations
bullets: Capture vehicles once and reuse data everywhere.
Increase reach with fewer manual steps.

items.title: AI Features
bullets: Capture vehicle records directly by voice.
AI transforms notes into clear bullet points.

LoginMeta.title: Login
LoginMeta.description: Secure access to your AutoSaaS workspace.

LoginPage.title: Sign in and continue your work.
LoginPage.description: Secure access to your AutoSaaS account with all customer, vehicle, and invoice data in one place.
LoginPage.formDescription: Use your business email and password.

form.hint: Secure access with your AutoSaaS account.

RegisterMeta.title: Registration
RegisterMeta.description: Create your free AutoSaaS account and get started immediately.

RegisterPage.title: Start free now and get productive right away.
RegisterPage.description: Create your AutoSaaS account in under a minute and start managing customers, vehicles, and invoices in one clear workflow.
RegisterPage.formDescription: Use your business email and choose a secure password.

form.hint: By creating an account, you agree to our terms and privacy policy.
